mapper.select: SELECT USER_NAME_KO FROM user WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT user_password FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into login_history ( loginId, loginTime, ip, country, subdivision, city ) values ( #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{ip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{country, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subdivision, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
